Wade according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention , and this is likely only a fraction of the actual number in light of the fact that several states ( including , significantly , California ) have failed to report abortion data for many years and in light of the latitude given to doctors in reporting causes of death ( e.g. , " hemorrhage " rather than " induced abortion . " )

text: It would be permissible to unplug and thereby cause the death of a person who is using another person's kidneys.
original_text: It is argued that just as it would be permissible to " unplug " and thereby cause the death of the person who is using one 's kidneys , so it is permissible to abort the fetus ( who similarly , it is said , has no right to use one 's body 's life-support functions against one 's will ) .
